message:
feat(runtime): migrate scope and actor hot paths to RuntimeState accessors (bd-2018r)

Migrates all direct `state.tasks` accesses in:
- src/cx/scope.rs: spawn, spawn_local, spawn_blocking hot paths
- src/actor.rs: spawn_task_locked paths

Changes:
- state.tasks.get() → state.task()
- state.tasks.get_mut() → state.task_mut()
- state.tasks.insert() → state.insert_task()
- state.tasks.remove() → state.remove_task()
- state.tasks.is_empty() → state.tasks_is_empty()

Part of bd-2018r (TaskTable Extraction) Phase 2b.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
